description:
Cross Platform Xray-core Client

OneXray is a cross-platform Xray-core client for managing proxy configurations and VPN/TUN connections.
OneXray v26.7.2 expands local configuration workflows, improves runtime safety, and adds better in-app diagnostics.
What's Changed
- Added Full Config for managing custom outbounds, routing, and DNS through the UI.
- Unified Outbound, Raw Json, and Full Config nodes in the Home Local list.
- Renamed Xray Setting to Xray Profile and refined Final Config behavior.
- Added Final Outbound support for chained routing through the selected Home node.
- Added an optional ad blocking toggle to Simple Profile.
- Added live Access and Error log viewers with tail loading and automatic follow.
- Added Markdown release notes to the routed update dialog.
- Updated Xray-core to v26.7.11.
Fixes
- Improved VPN start, stop, restart, timeout, and failure state consistency.
- Made backup restore and subscription writes transactional with safer rollback.
- Added bounded backup extraction to prevent oversized or invalid archives.
- Fixed reported dialog, navigation, Quick Settings Tile, and Invoke memory issues.
- Improved privacy-gated Firebase initialization and runtime error reporting.
